evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for PF_CREDIT_REDTEAM_OVERLAY; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: PF delinquency rose from 0.37% in 2021 to 2.70% in 2023; backlog alone cannot create Green. Sources: Reuters Korea tightens scrutiny to speed up real estate restructuring.

evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for PF_RESTRUCTURING_RELIEF; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Government support is Stage 1 relief; Stage 2 needs refinancing and cash-flow proof. Sources: Reuters Korea prepares financial support for builders.

company_name: Korea PF syndicated loan soft landing
evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for PF_SYNDICATED_LOAN_SOFT_LANDING; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Syndicated PF loans can support profitable projects, but unresolved bad projects, bridge loans, and cash conversion keep it Watch. Sources: Reuters Korea FSS says banks and insurers prepare PF syndicated loan.

evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for COMMERCIAL_REAL_ESTATE_CREDIT; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Dividend cut after office credit stress is a hard CRE credit 4C example. Sources: Reuters Blackstone mortgage fund slumps as empty offices intensify pressure.

evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for REIT_AFFO_INTEGRITY_OVERLAY; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Data-center REIT AFFO must be verified against maintenance capex and dividend coverage. Sources: Reuters Hindenburg shorts data center firm Equinix.

evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for DATA_CENTER_CAPEX_AFFO_DILUTION; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: AI data-center demand can still pressure per-share AFFO when capex and funding costs outrun growth. Sources: Reuters Equinix shares fall as revenue and capital spending forecast disappoint.

company_name: Equinix AI revenue guidance and AFFO gate
evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for DATA_CENTER_REIT_INFRASTRUCTURE; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: AI demand can support a data-center REIT, but Green still needs AFFO per share, capex integrity, power/water, and dividend coverage. Sources: round_115.md Reuters Equinix annual sales forecast above estimates on AI data-center demand.

company_name: Blackstone Digital Infrastructure Trust IPO no asset
evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for DATA_CENTER_REIT_IPO_NO_ASSET; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Sponsor and AI infrastructure demand are not enough before assets, tenants, NOI/AFFO, and power/water are verified. Sources: round_115.md Reuters Blackstone data center REIT raises $1.75 billion in US IPO.

evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for AI_DATA_CENTER_NO_REVENUE_NO_TENANT; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Pre-revenue AI real-asset mega-project valuation is 4B-watch, not Green. Sources: round_115.md Reuters Fermi data center REIT Nasdaq debut after IPO.

company_name: Fermi no tenant and net loss case
evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for AI_DATA_CENTER_NO_REVENUE_NO_TENANT; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: AI real-asset stories break when tenant lease, revenue, and funding remain unproven after valuation has moved. Sources: round_115.md FT Fermi shares plunge on net loss.

evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for DATA_CENTER_POWER_WATER_PERMITTING; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Power, water, noise, and local approval can break AI data-center real asset projects. Sources: Guardian Perth datacentre withdrawn after community opposition.

evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for DATA_CENTER_WATER_RIGHTS_REFERENDUM; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: A 9GW data-center plan can be a 4B-watch when power and water backlash are not resolved. Sources: Guardian Utah approves datacenter amid backlash.

evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for DATA_CENTER_LOCAL_MORATORIUM_OVERLAY; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Urban data-center moratorium risk can delay real assets even when AI demand is strong. Sources: round_115.md Guardian Seattle large data center moratorium watch.

evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for DATA_CENTER_LOCAL_MORATORIUM_OVERLAY; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Local moratoriums are a timing and execution gate, not a positive AI-infrastructure score input. Sources: round_115.md Indianapolis data center moratorium resolution.

evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for COLD_CHAIN_REIT_LOGISTICS; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Scale and customer count help, but net loss and AFFO uncertainty keep Green restricted. Sources: Investopedia Lineage begins trading in biggest IPO of 2024.

company_name: Lineage cold-storage debt and occupancy risk
evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for COLD_CHAIN_DEBT_OCCUPANCY_RISK; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Cold-chain warehouse scale is not Green when demand softens, energy cost and debt remain, and guidance is cut. Sources: Barrons cold-storage stock drawdown discussion.

evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for BUILDING_MATERIALS_PRICE_COST; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Building materials can be Watch-to-Green when price, cost, OPM, volume, and FCF align. Sources: Reuters Heidelberg Materials higher Q3 profit on cost and price management.

evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for LOW_CARBON_CEMENT_PREMIUM; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Pre-sold net-zero cement and CCS support Stage 2, while subsidy durability and durable green premium remain Stage 3 gates. Sources: Reuters Heidelberg sells out net-zero cement from Norway plant.

company_name: Cemex demand slowdown and cost-cut program
evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for BUILDING_MATERIALS_VOLUME_FAILURE; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Price increases and cost cuts cannot create Green when volume, demand, and EBITDA are weak. Sources: Reuters Cemex sales decline and savings program.

evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for BUILDING_MATERIALS_PRICE_COST; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Price/cost improvement can support Watch, but flat cement volume and ready-mix/aggregate weakness keep Green capped. Sources: round_115.md Reuters Cemex core earnings increase but volumes weak.

evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for BUILDING_PRODUCTS_MNA_SHIFT; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: A cement-to-building-products mix shift is Stage 2 until synergy, margin, FCF, and leverage stability are proven. Sources: Reuters Holcim to buy Xella for 1.85 billion euros.

company_name: Holcim Alkern precast building-solutions mix shift
evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for PRECAST_WALLING_BUILDING_SOLUTIONS; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Precast and water-management systems improve mix only after synergy, margin, FCF, and leverage are verified. Sources: round_115.md Reuters Holcim acquires French precast concrete maker Alkern.

evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for INFRA_RECONSTRUCTION_POLICY; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Reconstruction policy needs funded contracts and supplier margin evidence before Green. Sources: Round115 analyst matrix.

evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for INFRA_RECONSTRUCTION_POLICY; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Neom-related theme labels remain Event/Watch until actual contract economics are visible. Sources: Round115 analyst matrix.

evidence_summary: Round115 R10 case for POLICY_LOCAL_REAL_ESTATE_THEME; case evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Local real-estate policy themes remain Stage 1 until budget, contract, and revenue recognition are visible. Sources: Round115 analyst matrix.
